name: /doctor token-cost report exits non-zero when the count_tokens source is unavailable rather than silently estimating
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --sdk-stub unavailable 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'count_tokens_unavailable' err.txt && grep -q 'silent_estimation_blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
